verse.verse_3: Innā anzalnāhu fī lailatim mubārakatin innā kunnā munżirīn(a).
verse.verse_7: Rabbis-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa mā bainahumā, in kuntum mūqinīn(a).
verse.verse_8: Lā ilāha illā huwa yuḥyī wa yumīt(u), rabbukum wa rabbu ābā'ikumul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_13: Annā lahumuż-żikrā wa qad jā'ahum rasūlum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_14: Ṡumma tawallau ‘anhu wa qālū mu‘allamum majnūn(un).
verse.verse_16: Yauma nabṭisyul baṭsyatal kubrā, innā muntaqimūn(a).
verse.verse_17: Wa laqad fatannā qablahum qauma fir‘auna wa jā'ahum rasūlun karīm(un).
verse.verse_18: An addū ilayya ‘ibādallāh(i), innī lakum rasūlun amīn(un).
verse.verse_19: Wa al lā ta‘lū ‘alallāh(i), innī ātīkum bisulṭānim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_20: Wa innī ‘użtu birabbī wa rabbikum an tarjumūn(i).
verse.verse_21: Wa il lam tu'minū lī fa‘tazilūn(i).
verse.verse_22: Fa da‘ā rabbahū anna hā'ulā'i qaumum mujrimūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Fa asri bi‘ibādī lailan innakum muttaba‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Famā bakat ‘alaihimus-samā'u wal-arḍ(u), wa mā kānū munẓarīn(a).
verse.verse_30: Wa laqad najjainā banī isrā'īla minal-‘ażābil-muhīn(i).
verse.verse_33: Wa ātaināhum minal-āyāti mā fīhi balā'um mubīn(un).
verse.verse_35: In hiya illā mautatunal-ūlā wa mā naḥnu bimunsyarīn(a).
verse.verse_37: Ahum khairun am qaumu tubba‘(in), wal-lażīna min qablihim, ahlaknāhum innahum kānū mujrimīn(a).
verse.verse_38: Wa mā khalaqnas-samāwāti wal-arḍa wa mā bainahumā lā‘ibīn(a).
verse.verse_39: Mā khalaqnāhumā illā bil-ḥaqqi wa lākinna akṡarahum lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Yauma lā yugnī maulan ‘am maulan syai'aw wa lā hum yunṣarūn(a).
verse.verse_50: Inna hāżā mā kuntum bihī tamtarūn(a).
verse.verse_53: Yalbasūna min sundusiw wa istabraqim mutaqābilīn(a).
verse.verse_56: Lā yażūqūna fīhal-mauta illal-mautatal-ūlā, wa waqāhum ‘ażābal-jaḥīm(i).
verse.verse_58: Fa innamā yassarnāhu bilisānika la‘allahum yatażakkarūn(a).
